name: HYDRASCAN PRO+
shortDescription: 8+1 function hydrofacial with AI skin analysis. Real-time diagnostics, digital treatment diary, before-and-after documentation. The enhanced version of the PRO.
description:
The HYDRASCAN PRO+ is the enhanced version of the popular HYDRASCAN PRO – not just a multifunctional hydrofacial device, but an intelligent skin diagnostic and treatment system as well.

The device's specialty is combining traditional facial treatment technologies with artificial intelligence, making treatments not only more effective but also more personalized.

The built-in AI skin analysis system provides real-time diagnostics: pore size, wrinkle depth, pigmentation, hydration, sebum production, elasticity, inflamed areas, and UV damage – all automatically analyzed with treatment recommendations.
metaTitle: HydraSCAN PRO+ | AI Skin Analysis Integrated 8+1 Function Hydrofacial
metaDescription: HYDRASCAN PRO+ – the enhanced hydrofacial device: real-time AI skin diagnostics, 8+1 treatment functions, digital treatment diary. 2-year warranty.

videoDescription.headline: The HYDRASCAN PRO+ is not just a device – it's an intelligent skin diagnostic system
paragraphs: The device's specialty is combining traditional facial treatment technologies with artificial intelligence, making treatments not only more effective but also more personalized.

The built-in AI skin analysis system provides real-time diagnostics: pore size, wrinkle depth, pigmentation, hydration, sebum production, elasticity, inflamed areas, and UV damage – all automatically analyzed with treatment recommendations.
Before-and-after photos and charts can be created of the client's condition, and the system maintains a treatment diary so every change is documented.

features.title: Skin analysis powered by artificial intelligence
features.description:
The HYDRASCAN PRO+'s built-in AI skin analysis system provides real-time diagnostics for targeted and precise treatments.

The AI system examines:

pore size
wrinkle depth
pigmentation and spots
skin hydration level
sebum production
elasticity, tone
acne or inflamed areas
UV damage traces

features.title: Personalized treatment protocols
features.description: Based on the results, the device automatically recommends treatment directions. Before-and-after photos and charts can be created of the client's condition, and the system maintains a treatment diary so every change is documented. The client receives a treatment tailored to their skin, not a template treatment.

features.title: Convincing client communication with data and images
features.description: Thanks to the AI system, it's transparent to the client why they're receiving a specific treatment – this builds trust. The progress curve can be documented with charts, images, and data, so the visible results speak for themselves.

features.title: Digital treatment diary and before-and-after documentation
features.description: The system automatically creates before-and-after photos, charts, and maintains an online client card for every client. Treatment protocols are saved, so the reviewable treatment history encourages the client to return.

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the HYDRASCAN PRO+ device, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education.
items: HYDRASCAN PRO+ operating principles, technologies, and treatment heads
Intelligent skin analysis system interpretation and practical application
Treatment protocols for different skin types and concerns
Client communication and treatment diary management
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the HYDRASCAN PRO+ device.

faq.question: What exactly does the AI skin analysis system analyze?
faq.answer: The HydraSCAN PRO+ built-in AI system examines in real-time: pore size, wrinkle depth, pigmentation and spots, skin hydration level, sebum production, elasticity and tone, acne or inflamed areas, and UV damage traces. Based on results, it automatically recommends treatment directions.

faq.question: What advantage does AI diagnosis have over traditional skin analysis?
faq.answer: AI is objective, reproducible, and much more detailed than visual examination. It maps skin properties that cannot be detected with the naked eye. It also maintains a digital treatment diary, creates before-and-after images, so treatment effects are measurably documented.

faq.question: What's the difference between the PRO and the PRO+?
faq.answer: The HYDRASCAN PRO+ is the enhanced version of the PRO, with expanded functions and more advanced technology.

faq.question: What training comes with the HydraSCAN PRO+?
faq.answer: A 69,990 Ft official adult education operator training course is available. The training covers all functions, AI system interpretation, treatment protocols, and practical treatments. We issue an official certificate.

faq.question: How quickly does the HydraSCAN PRO+ pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-4 months, with 3-5 clients per day. A hydrofacial treatment is priced between 15,000-30,000 Ft, while AI-enhanced premium treatments can be offered at 35,000-50,000 Ft. Use our on-page ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What skin types is the treatment suitable for?
faq.answer: The HydraSCAN PRO+ is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin. The AI analysis precisely assesses the skin's condition and recommends a personalized treatment protocol based on the results.

faq.question: Can I view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the HydraSCAN PRO+ in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.
